allow: Bash(rm -rf apps/api/dist apps/web/build apps/api/*.tsbuildinfo && echo "cleaned"; echo "--- tree \(depth 3, no node_modules\) ---"; find . -type d -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' | grep -v node_modules | sort | head -80)

Bash(node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require\('./src/modules/users/entities/user.entity'\); require\('./src/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); console.log\('ALIAS RESOLUTION OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('ts-node'\).register\(\); require\('./src/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); require\('./src/shared/config/data-source'\); console.log\('TS-NODE + tsconfig-paths OK \(alias + data-source loaded\)'\);")

Bash(TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.prod.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "require\('./dist/modules/campaigns/entities/campaign.entity'\); require\('./dist/shared/config/data-source'\); require\('./dist/app.module'\); console.log\('PROD ALIAS RESOLUTION OK'\);")
Bash(cd apps/api/src/modules/campaigns && find . -type f | sort && echo "=== MIGRATIONS ===" && ls ../../migrations/)

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./i18n/resources/en-US.json'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j\)\); console.log\('--- campaign keys ---'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.campaign||{}\)\); console.log\('--- faction keys ---'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.faction||{}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./i18n/resources/en-US.json'\); console.log\('common:', JSON.stringify\(j.common\)\); console.log\('faction.list:', JSON.stringify\(j.faction.list\)\); console.log\('faction.validation:', JSON.stringify\(j.faction.validation\)\);")

Bash(" services/ability.service.ts | head && echo "" && echo "=== CharacterAbility type ===" && grep -n -A18 "export interface CharacterAbility " types/ability.ts && echo "=== campaignAttribute id field ===" && sed -n '1,12p' types/campaignAttribute.ts && echo "=== faction type ===" && grep -n "id\\|name\\|type" types/faction.ts | head)

Bash(grep -n "charBase\\|listCharacter\\|assign\\|CharacterAbility\\|abilities`" services/ability.service.ts | head && echo "" && echo "=== CharacterAbility type ===" && grep -n -A18 "export interface CharacterAbility " types/ability.ts && echo "=== campaignAttribute id field ===" && sed -n '1,12p' types/campaignAttribute.ts && echo "=== faction type ===" && grep -n "id\\|name\\|type" types/faction.ts | head)
